pluses: Cave-eyes that pierce the black — Night Vision, always
Wall-crawler — scales sheer stone tirelessly, climbing far up any wall in one clamber (climbing far beyond any other kindred)
Skulking and swift through the tunnels — nimble and quick afoot (base Goblin)
Children of the Dark — by night and in the deep places, a heavier blow (+30% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
Deft delver — quicker at hewing stone than most (base Goblin)
minuses: Wretched and frail of body — only 7 hearts (base Goblin)
Weak-armed — strikes for less even at rest (−10%, base Goblin)
Dread of the Sun — under open daylight strikes for far less (a further −25%) and is slowed (Slowness I)
Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
